Workmind.metaDescription: Describe a goal; AI builds a step-by-step workflow and category tool picks. Beta — still under development.
Workmind.title: Workmind
Workmind.subtitle: Describe what you want to achieve; AI drafts a step-by-step workflow (mindmap) and suggests tools by category.
Workmind.betaBody: Workmind is still in beta. Generated steps, category matches, and tool suggestions may be wrong, incomplete, or inconsistent. Do not rely on results for critical work without verification. Feedback helps shape the roadmap as the feature matures.
Workmind.promptPlaceholder: e.g. I want to launch an e-commerce store and market it from scratch…
Workmind.canvasHint: Beta: auto-generation is experimental — click nodes to inspect suggested tools.
Workmind.emptyBody: Type a goal above and hit Generate. e.g. start a podcast, market a SaaS, or validate a mobile app idea.
Workmind.toastGenerated: Workflow created. Click nodes to inspect.
Workmind.errorGenerate: Could not generate a workflow. Beta — try again with different wording.
Workmind.sourceKasif: Ranked by Kâşif for your goal.
Workmind.noTools: No matching tools for this step (or category match failed — beta).
Workmind.sidebarBetaNote: Suggestions are automatic and experimental; they may not always be the best match.

Learn.metaDescription: Master AI tools with category-based learning tracks, platform how-tos, and practical guides.
Learn.title: AI Learning Hub
Learn.subtitle: Not just a directory — a learning path. Pick a track, try sample tools, compare options, and build a workflow that fits you.
Learn.stepsHeading: How to learn on the platform
Learn.stepsSubheading: From discovery to practice in four steps
Learn.step1Body: Image, code, writing, or marketing: start with the job to be done, then narrow by category.
Learn.step2Body: Each track lists 3–4 real products. Open cards, check pricing and platforms, and pick one to test.
Learn.step3Body: Put 2–3 tools for the same job side by side and see which fits your workflow.
Learn.step4Body: Stuck? Describe your need and get a short, practical tool list from the assistant.
Learn.tracksSubheading: Built from the live catalog · current tool examples
Learn.trackNoTools: No approved tools in this track yet.
Learn.trackChatBody: Use ChatGPT, Claude, and similar assistants for Q&A, summaries, and ideation — the fastest first-week win.
Learn.trackWriteBody: Blogs, email, scripts, and rewrites. Build a draft → edit → brand-voice loop.
Learn.trackImageBody: Text-to-image, upscaling, and background cleanup. Practice prompts and style consistency.
Learn.trackVideoBody: Short clips, avatar video, and text-to-video. Start with a storyboard and 5–15s outputs.
Learn.trackCodeBody: In-IDE AI, PR review, and scaffolding. Treat it like pair programming on a small project.
Learn.trackMarketingBody: Content ideas, keywords, and social planning. Run one weekly campaign experiment.
Learn.trackProductivityBody: Meeting notes, tasks, and second-brain tools. Automate one flow (e.g. meeting → actions).
Learn.trackAudioBody: TTS, voice cloning, and music generation. Pick a concrete goal like a podcast intro.
Learn.pathsEmpty: No community paths yet. Start with a practical track or browse collections.
Learn.guidesSubheading: Blog guides · practical and up to date
Learn.guidesEmpty: No guide posts yet. Browse the blog or keep exploring with AI Recommend.
Learn.ctaBandBody: Open a category, try two tools, favorite one. That’s how learning starts.
Learn.emptyBody: The learning hub will fill up with guides and paths soon. Meanwhile, keep exploring tools.
Learn.betaBody: The learning center is currently in beta. Tracks and suggested tools are continuously updated.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Mission, vision, and story of AI Keşif Platformu.
AboutPage.title: About us
AboutPage.subtitle: Our journey to make AI’s potential accessible to everyone.
AboutPage.missionBody: We build a trusted, central place where developers, marketers, students, and creators can find the AI tools that fit their needs. In a complex, fast-growing landscape, we simplify discovery.
AboutPage.visionBody: Beyond a directory: a living community where people learn from each other, the best tools rise through shared experience, and the AI ecosystem’s pulse is easy to follow. We want to unlock new possibilities by pairing human potential with AI.
AboutPage.valueCommunityBody: Our users are the product’s strength. Every comment, rating, and suggestion matters.
AboutPage.valueDiscoveryBody: AI never stops—and neither do we. We keep researching and adding effective tools.
AboutPage.valueAccessBody: Everyone should benefit from AI, no matter their technical background.

ContactPage.metaDescription: Reach the AI Keşif Platformu team with questions, ideas, or feedback.
ContactPage.title: Contact us
ContactPage.subtitle: We’re here for questions, suggestions, and feedback.
ContactPage.formDescription: Fill out the form below to send us an email directly.

PrivacyPage.metaDescription: How AI Keşif Platformu respects your privacy and protects your data.
PrivacyPage.title: Privacy policy
PrivacyPage.sectionSecurityBody: We take privacy and data security seriously. This policy explains what we collect, how we use it, and how we protect your rights.
PrivacyPage.sectionDataBody: We store the email you provide at signup, plus interaction data such as comments, ratings, and favorites. When guests suggest a tool, we only temporarily store the email used for that action.
PrivacyPage.sectionUseBody: Data is used only to personalize your experience (for example, your profile) and to send service emails (confirmation, password reset, and similar). We never sell or share emails with third parties for marketing.
PrivacyPage.sectionCookiesBody: We use cookies required for core features such as session management and remembering theme preferences. These cookies do not collect personal data.

TermsPage.metaDescription: Terms and conditions you accept when using AI Keşif Platformu.
TermsPage.title: Terms of use
TermsPage.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the platform.
TermsPage.section1Body: By using this website, you fully accept the terms below. If you do not agree with any part, you should not use the platform.
TermsPage.section2Body: You are responsible for the accuracy of information you provide when registering or submitting content. Disrespectful, illegal, or spam comments are prohibited and may lead to suspension or account deletion.
TermsPage.section3Body: Rights to listed AI tools belong to their developers. User-generated content such as comments is treated as part of the platform. You remain responsible for what you submit.
TermsPage.section4Body: AI Keşif Platformu is not liable for damages arising from use or performance of listed tools. The platform is provided “as is,” without warranties of accuracy or uninterrupted availability.

MembershipPage.metaDescription: Go Pro for AI Content Studio, Pro tools, a special badge, and priority platform power.
MembershipPage.title: Unlock the full AI Discovery experience
MembershipPage.subtitle: Upgrade to Pro for AI Content Studio, exclusive Pro tools, a member badge, and features built for serious creators.
MembershipPage.statusProBody: Thanks for supporting the platform. Manage billing or jump into Pro-only features.

MembershipPage.billingError: Could not open the billing portal. Please try again.

MembershipPage.faq1A: Yes. Manage your subscription in the Stripe billing portal. You’ll keep Pro access until the end of the paid period.
MembershipPage.faq2A: Checkout runs on Stripe and accepts major cards. Local options may appear depending on your region.
MembershipPage.faq3A: Valid invite/promo codes apply at checkout as a secure Stripe coupon. Invalid codes are ignored.

Kasif.metaDescription: AI Discovery's tool recommendation and comparison assistant.
Kasif.title: Kâşif
Kasif.subtitle: Describe what you need and Kâşif will rank the tools on the platform for you.
Kasif.startersTitle: Where would you like to start?
Kasif.startersDescription: Choose an example or describe what you need in your own words below.

presentation.label: Create slides
presentation.question: Which tools can I use to create a presentation for free?

image.label: Generate images
image.question: Compare tools that create realistic images for social media.

code.label: Write code
code.question: Recommend free AI tools that can help me learn coding.

seo.label: SEO analysis
seo.question: Recommend SEO analysis and keyword research tools for my site.

email.label: Write email
email.question: Recommend a tool for writing cold email campaigns.

chatbot.label: Chat assistant
chatbot.question: Recommend a chat assistant for everyday questions.

Kasif.connectionError: Kâşif could not reach the server.
Kasif.softLandingHint: I don’t have the previous list in this request. Restate the task in one sentence for the best match.
Kasif.lowConfidenceHint: This match has low confidence. Try narrowing the question with a clearer task, price, or platform.
Kasif.ungroundedHint: No clear match was found in platform records. Try a starter prompt or describe your need more specifically.
Kasif.feedbackError: Could not save your feedback. Please try again.
Kasif.placeholder: For example: Which tools can I use to create a presentation for free?

ContentStudio.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Best image AI tools in 2026
ContentStudio.metaDescription: Draft blog posts and guides as an approved creator.
ContentStudio.title: Content studio
ContentStudio.subtitle: Create a blog post or guide draft, save it, and submit for admin review. Publishing happens only after approval.
ContentStudio.lockedBody: Content studio is open to members who contribute and meet the reputation threshold. Complete the requirements below, then submit your application.
ContentStudio.reqReputationHeadline: You need at least {min} reputation points
ContentStudio.progressCallout: Earn {remaining} more reputation points to unlock the form (target {min}). Follow the roadmap below.
ContentStudio.progressReady: You met the reputation threshold. Fill the application form below.
ContentStudio.reqAccountBody: You’re applying with a signed-in account.
ContentStudio.reqPitchBody: Describe what you want to create in 20+ characters.
ContentStudio.roadmapSubheading: Exact point values and direct links. Start with daily quests for the fastest path.
ContentStudio.dailyQuestsSubheading: Complete them to gain reputation immediately. Open quests are the fastest path.
ContentStudio.questProjection: If you claim +{available} from open quests, you’ll be at ≈ {projected}. {unlock}
ContentStudio.questProjectionUnlock: That’s enough to unlock the application!
ContentStudio.questProjectionPartial: You’ll get closer to the threshold.
ContentStudio.roadQuestsBody: Profile quests award about +5 to +20 points each.
ContentStudio.roadRateBody: Each tool rating awards +1 reputation point.
ContentStudio.roadCommentBody: +2 points per comment on tool pages.
ContentStudio.roadSubmitBody: If approved, you earn +25 — enough to clear the threshold alone.
ContentStudio.roadLearnBody: No points, but it helps you write better once you’re a creator.
ContentStudio.applySectionReady: Requirements met. Write a short pitch and apply.
ContentStudio.applySectionLocked: The form unlocks once the reputation threshold is met.
ContentStudio.applyFormLocked: Form locked: {remaining} more points needed (target {min}). Follow the roadmap, then return here.
ContentStudio.emptyPosts: No drafts yet. Create your first post above.
ContentStudio.applyPitchLabel: Why do you want to create content?
ContentStudio.applyPitchPlaceholder: e.g. I write AI tool guides and can contribute weekly roundups…
ContentStudio.applyPending: Your application is under review. You’ll be notified when approved.
ContentStudio.applyReputationHint: Applications typically need about {min} reputation points. Earn points via comments, favorites, and contributions.
ContentStudio.previewHint: This view is private to you; it won’t appear on the blog until published.
ContentStudio.previewPrivateNote: Private preview — not public and not indexed.
ContentStudio.deleteConfirmBody: This cannot be undone. The draft and its tags will be removed. Published posts cannot be deleted here.
ContentStudio.publishedLockedBody: This post is published. Contact an admin to edit it.
ContentStudio.notifyCreatorApproved: Your content creator application was approved. You can submit posts from Content Studio.
ContentStudio.notifyCreatorRejected: Your content creator application was not approved right now. You can try again later.
ContentStudio.notifyCreatorRevoked: Your content creator access was removed.
ContentStudio.errAdminAlreadyHasAccess: Admins already have full content access.
ContentStudio.errAlreadyCreator: You are already a content creator.
ContentStudio.errPitchTooShort: Write a short pitch (at least 20 characters).
ContentStudio.errReputationGate: You need at least {min} reputation points to apply (current: {current}, remaining: {remaining}). Rate tools, comment, or suggest tools via /submit to earn points.
ContentStudio.successApplicationAlreadyPending: Your application is already under review. You’ll be notified when approved.
ContentStudio.errApplicationSaveFailed: Could not save application. Try again shortly.
ContentStudio.successApplicationReceived: Application received. Content Studio opens after admin approval.
ContentStudio.errNeedApprovedCreator: You must be an approved creator to publish content.
ContentStudio.errInvalidStatus: Invalid status. Publishing is only allowed after admin approval.
ContentStudio.successSubmitted: Submitted for review. It will go live after admin approval.
ContentStudio.successWithdrawn: Withdrawn from review. Post is a draft again.
ContentStudio.errCannotDeletePublished: Published posts cannot be deleted. Contact an admin.
ContentStudio.errPublishedTagsLocked: Creators cannot change tags on published posts.
ContentStudio.workflowSubheading: Create a draft, write, then submit for review. Publishing happens only after admin approval.
ContentStudio.emptyPostsHint: Enter a title above; the editor opens automatically.
ContentStudio.rejectedBannerBody: Read the admin note, edit, and resubmit for review.
ContentStudio.resubmitHint: You can edit and submit for review again.
ContentStudio.inReviewHint: In review. You can withdraw and edit if needed.
ContentStudio.inReviewEditorHint: This post is in review. Saving updates the content; withdraw from review or wait for approval to publish.
ContentStudio.coverImageHint: Shown on the blog list and post page. JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF · max 5 MB.
ContentStudio.errCoverTooLarge: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.
ContentStudio.errCoverType: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF are allowed.
ContentStudio.errCoverUpload: Could not upload image. Try again shortly.
ContentStudio.errCoverInvalid: Enter a valid http(s) cover image URL.
ContentStudio.reviewRequirementsHint: To submit for review: title ≥ {titleMin} chars, body ≥ {contentMin} chars.
ContentStudio.errReviewTitleShort: Title must be at least {min} characters (now: {current}).
ContentStudio.errReviewContentShort: Body must be at least {min} characters (now: {current}). Markdown markup does not count.
ContentStudio.adminPublishedEditHint: You are editing a live post as admin. Saving updates the published content.
ContentStudio.pendingHeroBody: The admin team is reviewing your request. You’ll be notified when approved; the studio opens then.
ContentStudio.pendingCardBody: Only one open application at a time. You can’t submit another until you’re approved or rejected. Meanwhile, browse the blog and learning hub.
ContentStudio.relatedToolsHint: Link approved AI tools mentioned in the post (max 20). They appear on the blog page after publish.
ContentStudio.slugHint: Shown in the URL. Keep it unique; you can generate it from the title.
ContentStudio.searchPostsAria: Search posts by title or slug
ContentStudio.errPublishedToolsLocked: Creators cannot change tools on a published post.
ContentStudio.notifyPostReturned: "{title}" was returned to draft. You can edit and resubmit.
ContentStudio.errAssistNeedContent: Add a short title or body before using AI.
ContentStudio.errAssistEmpty: AI returned an empty response. Try again.
ContentStudio.errAssistFailed: AI assistant is unavailable right now. Try again shortly.
ContentStudio.errAssistRateLimit: Too many AI requests. Retry in {seconds}s.
ContentStudio.insightsSubheading: Publish performance, content mix, and page views.
ContentStudio.templatesHeading: Pick a template — start from a structure, not a blank page
ContentStudio.templateBlankBody: Write from scratch. Minimal structure, full freedom.
ContentStudio.templateComparisonBody: Compare two tools on features, price, and fit.
ContentStudio.templateComparisonDescription: {title} — a practical side-by-side guide for two AI tools.
ContentStudio.templateComparisonContent:
# {title}

## Quick take
Clarify who each tool is for, which jobs it wins, and the budget fit.

## Comparison table
| Criterion | Tool A | Tool B |
|-----------|--------|--------|
| Best for | … | … |
| Pricing | … | … |
| Learning curve | … | … |
| Strength | … | … |
| Weakness | … | … |

## Tool A in depth
- Who it is for
- Standout features
- Watch-outs

## Tool B in depth
- Who it is for
- Standout features
- Watch-outs

## When to pick which
1. …
2. …

## Bottom line
A short recommendation plus a next step (try, compare page, alternative).

## Related tools
Before review, link at least 2 tools in the studio.
ContentStudio.templateListicleBody: Ranked discovery list by category or job-to-be-done.
ContentStudio.templateListicleDescription: {title} — curated AI tools and when to use them.
ContentStudio.templateListicleContent:
# {title}

## Who this list is for
Audience, use case, and selection criteria.

## Quick summary
1. Tool 1 — one line
2. Tool 2 — one line
3. Tool 3 — one line

## 1) Tool name
**What it does**  
**Who it is for**  
**Pricing note**  
**Why it made the list**  

## 2) Tool name
…

## 3) Tool name
…

## How to choose
- Budget-first…
- Quality-first…
- Speed-first…

## Bottom line
One clear pick plus a “try now” call to action.
ContentStudio.templateTutorialDescription: {title} — a hands-on AI workflow you can follow.
ContentStudio.templateTutorialContent:
# {title}

## What you will learn
State the finished output in one sentence.

## Prerequisites
- Tool(s)
- Account / plan notes
- Sample input

## Step 1 — Prep
…

## Step 2 — Generate
Prompt / settings / screen notes.

## Step 3 — Refine
Quality checks and polish.

## Common mistakes
- …
- …

## Tips
- …

## Wrap-up
Summary plus a next-level experiment.
ContentStudio.templateWeeklyBody: Three tools/news items plus short commentary.
ContentStudio.templateWeeklyDescription: {title} — this week’s standout AI tools and notes.
ContentStudio.templateWeeklyContent:
# {title}

## This week’s theme
Short intro (1–2 paragraphs).

## 1) Standout tool
What changed / why it matters / who should try it.

## 2) Second signal
…

## 3) Practical tip
Something the reader can apply today.

## Links worth saving
- …

## Closing
A short teaser for next week.
